node.text: .dmg
Your begum is actually very cutiee and sweetheart humtish bhai❤️
@adakhann00 mai zyada cutie hu 🥰
@thathumtish youu both are cutiee heheh❤️
@thathumtish real
Flex mar raha hai mac book ki
Bsdk Japan betha hai koi sharam kar, it's a 3rd world country, yes it's gareeb hai apna mulk
@thathumtish or ha Pakistani/brown Banda jitna Marzi apne ap ko bashaour or mature dikha le, Uska inmate kamina pan dikh hi jata hai somehow jese ani apka dikh gya
Wo bhi itna Purana

When you get something after doing soo much efforts. The feel is different, the experience is different. Things which are normal for some people , hold soo much value when its earned instead of Given. Unmatched 🙌❤️
That voice shaking.... While explaining story..... Love that vibe!
Kisi ko ghar se niklty hi mil gai manzil, Or koi Umar bhar hmari trha .exe pe raha
Yarrrrrr begum?????? Masha Allah
I always always learned something from you❤️

I am sure u are grateful for everything but just want to call out there are many who dont even get something as precious a macbook from their parents . They hustle because they knkw all their wishes beeds to be fulfilled by them. Not saying i am jelous of you but just saying how u think that rich kid was not valuing that and how many will thunk u not valuing yours
@learner.of.something that’s precisely the whole reel. Privilege makes you insensitive. The way you cope with it is you assign value to your story rather than the material.

Agree, my first mbp m3 pro by my own money has still my heart. But aik time tha k me Intel wali Lena ka sochta tha just but Allah bless me that now I can afford whole ecosystem, in short "mil jay to mitti na Mily to Sona"
Nice caption 🙌
Cool isteekars bro!

jb hm kch struggle se lety hain uska ek alag maza hota ha or wo bht saalo bad jb hmary oas sb kch hota ha to ye ek achi yad bn jati ha or acha lgta ha k hm aj us wqt se b nikal k ay hain tb b survive kr rhy thy km mai to ab kya tklif ha ab ku nhi kr rhy
Someone's dream is someone's toy.
Man, it’s not that deep
University in 2012 damn you're old
@safeer_51 2011
@thathumtish 😂😭 good work btw keep it up
you da real stieekers
No one flexed during the creation of this video.
Tell me you are ghareeb with out telling me you are ghareeb !
